creator: grahamperrin@freebsd.org
text:
From <https://www.freebsd.org/community/>: 

> … we run a number of FreeBSD IRC channels and host a Discord server …

From more recent <https://wiki.freebsd.org/action/info/Discord?action=diff&rev2=86&rev1=85>: 

> The project isn't hosting Discord infrastructure, and the 
> former phrasing implied this. …
